## Summary

<!-- What does this PR do? One or two sentences. -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature / capability
- [ ] Refactoring (no functional change)
- [ ] Performance improvement
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] CI / tooling
- [ ] Security fix

## Checklist

- [ ] No secrets, credentials or PII in the diff.
- [ ] Unit tests added or updated.
- [ ] Integration tests added or updated if infrastructure is touched.
- [ ] Architecture tests still pass (`dotnet test tests/Architecture`).
- [ ] Coverage remains above threshold (`dotnet test --collect:"XPlat Code Coverage"`).
- [ ] No new compiler warnings (`-warnaserror` enforced in CI).
- [ ] `dotnet format` passes locally.
- [ ] Related ADR created or updated if this is an architectural decision.
- [ ] `docs/roadmap.md` updated if a roadmap item is completed.
- [ ] Self-reviewed before requesting review.
